description: Expanded machine-usable task and project contract for the Todos app. This surface stays thin over the existing server-side todo and project services.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer access token for authenticated agent calls.

headers.name: X-Agent-Name
headers.description: Logical agent identifier recorded in trace logs.

headers.name: X-Agent-Request-Id
headers.description: Caller-supplied correlation ID echoed in responses and logs.

headers.name: Idempotency-Key
headers.description: Optional idempotency key for supported create actions and planner apply flows. Replays return the original successful response for matching input, backed by durable storage in the normal server runtime.

todo.notes: Canonical task shape returned by the server. category remains supported for compatibility while projectId is the canonical project link.

actions.name: list_tasks
actions.description: See your tasks — filter by project, status, due date, priority, or search by keyword. Returns task details including scheduling and workflow metadata.

actions.name: search_tasks
actions.description: Search tasks by text with the same filters as list_tasks.

actions.name: get_task
actions.description: Fetch a single task by ID.

actions.name: get_project
actions.description: Fetch a single project by ID.

actions.name: create_task
actions.description: Create a task using the server-side task rules and canonical task fields.

actions.name: update_task
actions.description: Update a task by ID using partial task semantics.

actions.name: complete_task
actions.description: Set a task completion state explicitly. Defaults to completed=true.

actions.name: archive_task
actions.description: Set the archived state for a task by ID.

actions.name: delete_task
actions.description: Archive a task by default, or hard-delete it when hardDelete=true.

actions.name: add_subtask
actions.description: Add a subtask to a task owned by the current user.

actions.name: update_subtask
actions.description: Update a subtask title, completion state, or ordering.

actions.name: delete_subtask
actions.description: Delete a subtask from a task owned by the current user.

actions.name: list_projects
actions.description: List projects for the current user with optional status, archive, and review cadence filters.

actions.name: create_project
actions.description: Create a project using the existing server-side project rules.

actions.name: update_project
actions.description: Update a project by ID with richer metadata fields.

actions.name: rename_project
actions.description: Rename an existing project by ID.

actions.name: delete_project
actions.description: Delete a project, optionally reassigning its tasks or archiving the project instead.

actions.name: move_task_to_project
actions.description: Move a task to another project by project ID, or unassign it when projectId is null.

actions.name: archive_project
actions.description: Set the archived state for a project by ID.

actions.name: list_today
actions.description: List tasks due or scheduled for today, with optional overdue and completed inclusion.

actions.name: list_next_actions
actions.description: List next or in-progress actions, optionally filtered by project, context, energy, and limit.

actions.name: list_waiting_on
actions.description: List waiting tasks or tasks with waitingOn metadata, optionally scoped to a project.

actions.name: list_upcoming
actions.description: List upcoming due or scheduled tasks within the requested day horizon.

actions.name: list_stale_tasks
actions.description: List tasks not updated within the requested age threshold.

actions.name: list_projects_without_next_action
actions.description: List active projects that do not currently have a next or in-progress action.

actions.name: review_projects
actions.description: List projects due for review, or all non-archived projects when dueForReviewOnly=false.

actions.name: plan_project
actions.description: Generate a practical project plan and optionally create the missing tasks through the canonical task service.

actions.name: ensure_next_action
actions.description: Ensure a project has one concrete next action and optionally create it through the canonical task service.

actions.name: weekly_review
actions.description: Run your weekly review — surfaces stale tasks, projects missing next actions, waiting items, and overdue work. In suggest mode returns findings; in apply mode creates action items and marks projects reviewed.

actions.name: prewarm_home_focus
actions.description: Generate or reuse a fresh Home AI focus snapshot so Home can render a recent suggestion set before the user opens the app.

actions.name: decide_next_work
actions.description: What should you work on next? Ranks your tasks by urgency, effort, energy match, and dependencies to recommend the most impactful next action.

actions.name: analyze_project_health
actions.description: Return a project health view with risks and recommended interventions.

actions.name: analyze_work_graph
actions.description: Analyze project dependencies to show blocked work, unblocked work, and the current critical path.

actions.name: analyze_task_quality
actions.description: Analyze open tasks for quality issues: missing action verbs, vague language, multi-action titles, excessive length.

taskIds.description: Optional list of task IDs to analyze. Defaults to all open tasks.

projectId.description: Optional: filter to tasks in this project.

output.description: Quality analysis result for each task.

actions.name: find_duplicate_tasks
actions.description: Detect exact, normalized, and near-duplicate open tasks using title similarity.

projectId.description: Optional: scope to a single project.

scope.description: Optional scope hint (e.g. 'active'). Reserved for future use.

output.description: Groups of potentially duplicate tasks with confidence and suggested action.

actions.name: find_stale_items
actions.description: Find tasks and projects not updated within a configurable number of days.

staleDays.description: Threshold in days. Items not updated in this many days are stale. Default 30.

output.description: staleTasks and staleProjects arrays, plus the effective staleDays and threshold date.

actions.name: taxonomy_cleanup_suggestions
actions.description: Suggest project hygiene improvements: similar project names and projects with very few tasks.

output.description: similarProjects pairs and smallProjects list.

actions.name: plan_today
actions.description: Plan your day — generates a time-boxed daily plan by selecting tasks that fit your available time and energy level. Returns recommended tasks ranked by priority, due dates, and effort, with explanations for why each was included.

availableMinutes.description: Total available minutes for the day. Default 480.

energy.description: Current energy level, used to weight task effort.

decisionRunId.description: Optional job run ID from the caller (agent runner). Attached to all attribution blocks in the response so the evaluator can correlate outcomes to this run.

output.description: selectedTasks array with estimatedMinutes, plus totalMinutes and remainingMinutes.

actions.name: break_down_task
actions.description: Break a complex task into actionable steps — suggests subtask decompositions based on the task title and description, with estimated effort for each step.

taskId.description: ID of the task to decompose.

maxSubtasks.description: Maximum number of suggested subtasks. Default 5.

output.description: suggestedSubtasks array with title and order, plus decompositionBasis.

actions.name: suggest_next_actions
actions.description: Return prioritized actionable tasks for a project, ordered by status and priority.

output.description: suggestedActions task array with projectName and total count.

actions.name: weekly_review_summary
actions.description: Read-only summary of the current week: tasks completed, created, stale, waiting, inbox count, and projects with no active tasks.

weekStart.description: ISO date for week start (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to the current Monday.

output.description: weekStart, weekEnd, completed, created, stale, waiting, inboxCount, projectsWithNoActive.

actions.name: triage_capture_item
actions.description: Analyze a single capture item and suggest how to convert it to a task, note, or discard it. Pass mode='apply' to mark it as triaged.

mode.description: suggest (default) returns recommendations only; apply marks the item as triaged.

output.description: recommendation object with kind, confidence, why, proposedAction, and applied boolean.

actions.name: triage_inbox
actions.description: Batch-triage capture items with lifecycle='new'. Returns recommendations for each. Pass mode='apply' to mark them as triaged.

output.description: triaged array, totalProcessed, and mode.

actions.name: list_audit_log
actions.description: Return recent agent operation audit log entries for the authenticated user.

since.description: ISO timestamp — return only entries after this date.

output.description: entries array and total count.

actions.name: get_availability_windows
actions.description: Return time availability windows for a given day, based on planning preferences. Also returns tasks already scheduled for that day.

output.description: windows array with start/end/minutes, scheduledTasks, and totalAvailableMinutes.

actions.name: create_follow_up_for_waiting_task
actions.description: Create a follow-up next-action task for a task that is in 'waiting' status. Supports a cooldown window to avoid duplicate follow-ups and a suggest/apply mode.

taskId.description: ID of the waiting task to create a follow-up for.

mode.description: suggest returns a preview without writing; apply creates the task. Defaults to suggest.

cooldownDays.description: Skip creation if a follow-up was already created within this many days. Defaults to 7.

priority.description: Priority for the follow-up task. Defaults to medium.

output.description: created boolean, task (when created), skipped/reason (when cooldown active), and waitingTaskId.

actions.name: claim_job_run
actions.description: Atomically claim a job run slot for a given jobName+periodKey combination. Returns claimed=false if already claimed (deduplication lock).

jobName.description: Logical name of the scheduled job (e.g. 'daily_review').

periodKey.description: Period identifier (e.g. '2026-03-16'). Combined with jobName for uniqueness.

output.description: claimed boolean and run record when claimed.

actions.name: complete_job_run
actions.description: Mark a previously claimed job run as completed. Returns 404 if no matching running job run is found.

metadata.description: Optional JSON metadata to store with the completed run.

output.description: completed boolean, jobName, and periodKey.

actions.name: fail_job_run
actions.description: Mark a previously claimed job run as failed. Returns 404 if no matching running job run is found.

errorMessage.description: Error message describing why the job failed. Truncated to 500 characters.

output.description: failed boolean, jobName, and periodKey.

actions.name: get_job_run_status
actions.description: Retrieve the status record for a specific jobName+periodKey combination.

output.description: run record or null if not found.

actions.name: list_job_runs
actions.description: List recent agent job run records for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by jobName or status.

limit.description: Maximum records to return. Defaults to 50.

output.description: runs array and total count.

actions.name: record_failed_action
actions.description: Record a failed automation action to the dead-letter store for later inspection or retry.

entityType.description: Optional entity type the action targeted (e.g. 'task').

entityId.description: Optional entity ID the action targeted.

payload.description: Optional JSON payload for retry context.

retryable.description: Whether the action can be retried. Defaults to false.

output.description: record object with the created failed-action entry.

actions.name: list_failed_actions
actions.description: List failed automation actions from the dead-letter store, optionally filtered by jobName, periodKey, or resolved status.

includeResolved.description: Include already-resolved entries. Defaults to false.

output.description: records array and total count.

actions.name: resolve_failed_action
actions.description: Resolve (dismiss or mark retried) a failed automation action in the dead-letter store.

id.description: ID of the failed action record to resolve.

resolution.description: How the failed action was resolved.

output.description: resolved boolean indicating whether the record was found and updated.

actions.name: get_agent_config
actions.description: Get the current agent automation configuration for the authenticated user. Returns enabled/disabled flags for each job and tuning parameters.

output.description: config object with job-enabled flags and threshold parameters.

actions.name: update_agent_config
actions.description: Update the agent automation configuration. Only the supplied fields are changed; unspecified fields keep their current values.

dailyEnabled.description: Enable or disable the daily planning job.

weeklyEnabled.description: Enable or disable the weekly review job.

inboxEnabled.description: Enable or disable the inbox triage job.

watchdogEnabled.description: Enable or disable the aging watchdog job.

decomposerEnabled.description: Enable or disable the project decomposer job.

autoApply.description: When true, safe allowlisted actions are applied automatically.

maxWriteActionsPerRun.description: Circuit-breaker: maximum write actions per job run.

inboxConfidenceThreshold.description: Minimum confidence required to auto-apply an inbox triage suggestion (0–1).

staleThresholdDays.description: Tasks untouched for this many days are flagged as stale.

waitingFollowUpDays.description: Waiting tasks older than this many days without a follow-up trigger one.

output.description: Updated config object.

actions.name: replay_job_run
actions.description: Replay (re-open for re-execution) a previously completed or failed job run. Increments retryCount and resets status to 'running'. The agent runner is responsible for re-executing the job.

jobName.description: Name of the job to replay (e.g. 'daily', 'inbox_triage').

periodKey.description: Period key of the run to replay (e.g. '2026-03-16').

output.description: replayed boolean and the updated run record.

actions.name: simulate_plan
actions.description: Simulate the daily plan for a given date and budget without writing anything. Optionally diff against a compareToDate to see which tasks would be added or removed. Each recommended and excluded task includes an attribution block with decisionRunId, rank, score, and timestamp.

compareToDate.description: Optional second date to diff against.

decisionRunId.description: Optional job run ID from the caller (agent runner). Attached to all attribution blocks in the response so the evaluator can correlate outcomes to this run.

output.description: plan object and optional diff.

actions.name: record_metric
actions.description: Record an automation metric event. Used by agent runner jobs to emit counters and measurements.

jobName.description: Name of the job emitting the metric.

periodKey.description: Period key of the job run.

entityType.description: Optional entity type the metric relates to.

output.description: Created metric event record.

actions.name: list_metrics
actions.description: List raw metric events for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by job name, metric type, or period key.

output.description: Array of metric event records and total count.

actions.name: metrics_summary
actions.description: Return aggregated metric statistics grouped by metric type: count, total, avg, min, max.

jobName.description: Restrict summary to a single job.

since.description: ISO datetime lower bound for recordedAt filter.

output.description: Array of summary entries, one per metricType.

actions.name: record_recommendation_feedback
actions.description: Record a feedback signal on a plan_today recommendation: accepted, ignored, snoozed, or reordered. Used to close the feedback loop and improve future plan scoring.

planDate.description: The plan date the recommendation was made for.

signal.description: How the user responded to the recommendation.

energy.description: Energy level at time of feedback.

availableMinutes.description: Time budget at time of feedback.

score.description: Score the task had when recommended.

output.description: Created feedback record.

actions.name: list_recommendation_feedback
actions.description: List raw recommendation feedback events, optionally filtered by taskId, signal type, or date range.

output.description: Array of feedback records and total count.

actions.name: feedback_summary
actions.description: Return per-task feedback aggregates: acceptance rate, count per signal type, and last signal.

since.description: ISO datetime lower bound for feedback window.

output.description: Array of per-task summary entries and total count.

actions.name: set_day_context
actions.description: Set the life state / mode context for a given day. Affects plan_today scoring: overloaded caps task count, travel reduces budget, sprint boosts project tasks, catch_up prioritizes waiting items.

contextDate.description: Date to set context for (default today).

mode.description: Day mode that modifies planner behavior.

energy.description: Override energy level for plan_today scoring.

output.description: Upserted day context record.

actions.name: get_day_context
actions.description: Get the life state / mode context for a given day.

contextDate.description: Date to retrieve context for (default today).

output.description: Day context record or null if not set.

actions.name: weekly_executive_summary
actions.description: Return a strategic weekly digest: tasks completed, reactive vs proactive ratio, blocked projects, attention diffusion, automation stats, and plain-English insights.

output.description: WeeklyExecutiveSummary object with completedCount, blockedProjects, attentionDiffusion, agentStats, topInsights.

actions.name: capture_inbox_item
actions.description: Capture a quick idea or task — drops it into your inbox for later triage. No AI processing happens now; you organize it when you're ready.

item.description: The created capture item with id, text, source, lifecycle, capturedAt.

actions.name: list_inbox_items
actions.description: Return capture items with optional filters. Defaults to all lifecycles. Use lifecycle=new to see unprocessed items.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return.

since.description: Return items captured on or after this timestamp.

actions.name: promote_inbox_item
actions.description: Convert a capture item directly into a task or project without re-running full triage. Marks the capture as triaged.

captureItemId.description: ID of the capture item to promote.

type.description: Whether to create a task or a project.

projectId.description: Assign the new task to this project (task only).

title.description: Override title. Defaults to the capture text.

actions.name: evaluate_daily_plan
actions.description: Evaluate yesterday's planner output against actual task completions. Returns acceptance rate, exclusion regret, budget fit score, and config recommendations.

decisionRunId.description: Optional job run ID to scope evaluation to a specific run.

evaluation.description: DailyEvaluationResult with acceptance rate, exclusion regret, budget fit, and config recommendations.

actions.name: evaluate_weekly_system
actions.description: Evaluate weekly automation quality and system health. Returns automation success rate, follow-up usefulness, stale task trends, and config recommendations.

evaluation.description: WeeklyEvaluationResult with automation metrics, stale trends, and config recommendations.

actions.name: record_learning_recommendation
actions.description: Record a learning recommendation for a config or score-weight change, produced by an evaluator job.

currentValue.description: Current value of the target field.

evidence.description: Optional structured evidence backing the recommendation.

actions.name: list_learning_recommendations
actions.description: List learning recommendations for the user, optionally filtered by status.

status.description: Filter by recommendation status. Omit for all.

actions.name: apply_learning_recommendation
actions.description: Apply a pending learning recommendation to AgentConfig. Only targets in the safe-apply allowlist are eligible.

id.description: ID of the LearningRecommendation to apply.

actions.name: list_friction_patterns
actions.description: Surface recurring friction signals: tasks deferred repeatedly, recommendations ignored, follow-up churn, and stalled projects. Defaults to the last 30 days.

since.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 30 days ago.

patterns.description: Array of FrictionPattern objects (repeated_deferral, ignored_recommendation, follow_up_churn, project_stall).

actions.name: get_action_policies
actions.description: Return per-action auto-apply policies and confidence thresholds for the current user.

actions.name: update_action_policy
actions.description: Update the auto-apply policy and confidence threshold for a specific action.

actionName.description: The agent action name to update policy for.

autoApply.description: Whether this action may be auto-applied.

minConfidence.description: Minimum confidence score required for auto-apply.

notes: category remains supported for backward compatibility while projectId is the canonical project relationship.
completed=true maps to status=done. Non-completed tasks default to a workflow status such as next or the explicitly provided status.
Archived tasks are excluded from task list queries by default unless archived=true is requested.
delete_project unassigns tasks by default unless moveTasksToProjectId is supplied.

_namespaces.core: System of record — tasks, projects, subtasks

_audiences.user: General product actions invoked by or on behalf of a user
_audiences.agent: Actions called by automated agents during job runs
_audiences.operator: Admin/debug tools for operators and developers

_lifecycles.primitive_read: Returns raw state with no interpretation
_lifecycles.suggestive: Returns proposals; does not write by default

golden_paths.label: Daily Planner
golden_paths.description: Produce a realistic daily plan for the user.

golden_paths.label: Weekly Maintenance
golden_paths.description: Keep the task system clean and surfaces stale or broken items.

golden_paths.label: Waiting-Item Follow-Up
golden_paths.description: Move external dependencies forward by creating follow-up tasks.

golden_paths.label: Project Rescue
golden_paths.description: Restore motion to a stuck or drifting project.

golden_paths.label: Inbox Processing
golden_paths.description: Convert raw captures into structured work.

golden_paths.label: Failed Automation Recovery
golden_paths.description: Recover cleanly from broken agent runs.
